title: gpu1 SIMT engine with banked global memory (tunable)

lanes.doc: SIMT lanes, 1..64. Need not be a power of two; the thread id is formed by addition.

banks.doc: Global-memory banks, a power of two. Peak memory throughput is one word per bank per round, so banks == lanes makes a coalesced access single-round.

enable_div.doc: Include DIV/REM/DIVU/REMU (iterative, 32 steps, all lanes in parallel). 0 drops them for a smaller part.

enable_shfl.doc: Include the cross-lane shuffle. Costs a lanes x lanes mux, so it is the first thing to drop on a small part.
